compliance.assurance_rationale: NERC CIP-002-5.1a R1 BES cyber system identification — automated compliance checks inventory and attribute BES Cyber Systems as the R1 identification process requires.
NERC CIP-007-6 R4 Security event monitoring — the UC consolidates the security-event monitoring checks the R4 requirement demands on BES Cyber Assets.
TSA SD02C III.A Cybersecurity plan — NERC CIP readiness checks overlap with the pipeline cybersecurity plan expectations published in SD02C.
TSA SD02C III.D Cybersecurity assessment — compliance check dashboards serve as the recurring cybersecurity assessment evidence.
